rows.acceptance_criterion: Page supports InsertSlot/ReadSlot/DeleteSlot within a 4KB buffer
rows.assertion: insert returns slotID, ReadSlot returns identical bytes, DeleteSlot succeeds, ReadSlot after delete returns an error
FreeSpace() decreases by (slotHeaderSize + len(data)) after each fresh insert; matches expected remaining bytes

rows.acceptance_criterion: Rejects inserts that would overflow the page (behavior 1 of test spec)
rows.assertion: InsertSlot is called in a loop with fixed-size payloads until it returns a non-nil error; test asserts the error is returned (not a panic, not silent truncation) and that at least one insert succeeded before the page filled up

rows.acceptance_criterion: Delete + reinsert reuses freed slot space (behavior 2 of test spec)
rows.assertion: Page is filled to capacity (further insert fails with overflow), one slot is deleted, then a same-or-smaller-sized InsertSlot is attempted; test asserts this reinsert SUCCEEDS (proving reuse, since a fresh-space insert of that size would have failed given the page was already full) and that the returned slotID equals the deleted slot's ID
